records.question: Which customers named Cecelia with customer number 429, email caesar.lemke@example.net, phone 672-559-0630x7875, living at 4065 Forest Vista Apt. 103, and using Direct Debit had an address starting on 2009-05-22 04:42:28?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_email = 'caesar.lemke@example.net' AND customers.customer_phone = '672-559-0630x7875' AND customer_address_history.date_from = '2009-05-22 04:42:28' AND customers.customer_name = 'Cecelia' AND customers.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit' AND customers.customer_address = '4065 Forest Vista Apt. 103' AND customers.customer_number = '429'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id 
FROM Customers AS customers 
JOIN Customer_Address_History AS history ON customers.customer_id = history.customer_id 
WHERE customers.customer_name = 'Cecelia' 
AND customers.customer_number = '429' 
AND customers.customer_email = 'caesar.lemke@example.net' 
AND customers.customer_phone = '672-559-0630x7875' 
AND customers.customer_address = '4065 Forest Vista Apt. 103' 
AND customers.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit' 
AND history.date_from = '2009-05-22 04:42:28'

records.question: Which customers named Cheyenne use Direct Debit as their payment method?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
WHERE customers.customer_name = 'Cheyenne' AND customers.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id 
FROM Customers 
WHERE customers.customer_name = 'Cheyenne' 
AND customers.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit'

records.question: Which customers living at 058 Ben Street Apt. 034 have orders with status Completed?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customer_orders.order_status_code = 'Completed' AND customers.customer_address = '058 Ben Street Apt. 034'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Customers.customer_id 
FROM Customers 
JOIN Customer_Orders ON Customers.customer_id = Customer_Orders.customer_id 
WHERE Customers.customer_address = '058 Ben Street Apt. 034' 
AND Customer_Orders.order_status_code = 'Completed'

records.question: Which customers have addresses in Gleasonland, Kentucky?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
JOIN addresses ON customer_address_history.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE addresses.state_province_county = 'Kentucky' AND addresses.city = 'Gleasonland'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Customers.customer_id 
FROM Customers 
JOIN Customer_Address_History ON Customers.customer_id = Customer_Address_History.customer_id 
JOIN Addresses ON Customer_Address_History.address_id = Addresses.address_id 
WHERE Addresses.city = 'Gleasonland' AND Addresses.state_province_county = 'Kentucky'

records.question: Who are the customers with customer number 838, address 058 Ben Street Apt. 034, and phone 009-136-4509x19635, who pay by Direct Debit, placed completed orders on or before 1979-03-29 02:47:13, and have an address history starting from 2013-06-14 23:07:04 and ending at least 2018-03-16 14:49:28?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_phone = '009-136-4509x19635' AND customer_orders.order_date <= '1979-03-29 02:47:13' AND customer_orders.order_status_code = 'Completed' AND customers.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit' AND customer_address_history.date_to >= '2018-03-16 14:49:28' AND customers.customer_number = '838' AND customers.customer_address = '058 Ben Street Apt. 034' AND customer_address_history.date_from = '2013-06-14 23:07:04'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customer_Orders co ON c.customer_id = co.customer_id
JOIN Customer_Address_History cah ON c.customer_id = cah.customer_id
WHERE c.customer_number = '838'
  AND c.customer_address = '058 Ben Street Apt. 034'
  AND c.customer_phone = '009-136-4509x19635'
  AND c.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit'
  AND co.order_status_code = 'completed'
  AND co.order_date <= '1979-03-29 02:47:13'
  AND cah.date_from = '2013-06-14 23:07:04'
  AND (cah.date_to IS NULL OR cah.date_to >= '2018-03-16 14:49:28')

records.question: Which customers named Cleo with customer number 795 use Credit Card as their payment method and have placed orders on or after 2002-01-20 01:52:53?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customer_orders.order_date >= '2002-01-20 01:52:53' AND customers.payment_method_code = 'Credit Card' AND customers.customer_name = 'Cleo' AND customers.customer_number = '795'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id
FROM Customers AS customers
JOIN Customer_Orders AS orders ON customers.customer_id = orders.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_name = 'Cleo'
AND customers.customer_number = '795'
AND customers.payment_method_code = 'Credit Card'
AND orders.order_date >= '2002-01-20 01:52:53'

records.question: Which customers named Lela with the email vandervort.helena@example.org had a partial order and an address that started exactly on 2010-03-25 08:23:20?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_address_history ON customers.customer_id = customer_address_history.customer_id
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customer_address_history.date_from = '2010-03-25 08:23:20' AND customers.customer_email = 'vandervort.helena@example.org' AND customer_orders.order_status_code = 'Part' AND customers.customer_name = 'Lela'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id
FROM Customers customers
JOIN Contacts contacts ON customers.customer_id = contacts.customer_id
JOIN Customer_Orders orders ON customers.customer_id = orders.customer_id
WHERE contacts.first_name = 'Lela'
  AND customers.customer_email = 'vandervort.helena@example.org'
  AND orders.order_status_code = 'partial'
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM Customer_Address_History history
      WHERE history.customer_id = customers.customer_id
        AND history.date_from = '2010-03-25 08:23:20'
  )
